'''鈭歠-v-f''' ('''kafavaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dualize|dualize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dualize|dualize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| kafavaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifavaf|thifavaf]] || [[word:jifavaf|jifavaf]] || [[word:shifavaf|shifavaf]] || [[word:kifavaf|kifavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufavaf|thuthufavaf]] || [[word:jujufavaf|jujufavaf]] || [[word:shushufavaf|shushufavaf]] || [[word:kukufavaf|kukufavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufavaf|thufavaf]] || [[word:jufavaf|jufavaf]] || [[word:shufavaf|shufavaf]] || [[word:kufavaf|kufavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufavaf|thufavaf]] || [[word:jufavaf|jufavaf]] || [[word:shufavaf|shufavaf]] || [[word:kufavaf|kufavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefavaf|thefavaf]] || [[word:jefavaf|jefavaf]] || [[word:shefavaf|shefavaf]] || [[word:kefavaf|kefavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofavaf|thothofavaf]] || [[word:jojofavaf|jojofavaf]] || [[word:shoshofavaf|shoshofavaf]] || [[word:kokofavaf|kokofavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofavaf|thofavaf]] || [[word:jofavaf|jofavaf]] || [[word:shofavaf|shofavaf]] || [[word:kofavaf|kofavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofavaf|thofavaf]] || [[word:jofavaf|jofavaf]] || [[word:shofavaf|shofavaf]] || [[word:kofavaf|kofavaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]] || [[word:favaf|favaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙favaf|th忙favaf]] || [[word:j忙favaf|j忙favaf]] || [[word:sh忙favaf|sh忙favaf]] || [[word:k忙favaf|k忙favaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafavaf|thathafavaf]] || [[word:jajafavaf|jajafavaf]] || [[word:shashafavaf|shashafavaf]] || [[word:kakafavaf|kakafavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafavaf|thafavaf]] || [[word:jafavaf|jafavaf]] || [[word:shafavaf|shafavaf]] || [[word:kafavaf|kafavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafavaf|thafavaf]] || [[word:jafavaf|jafavaf]] || [[word:shafavaf|shafavaf]] || [[word:kafavaf|kafavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafavaf|shafavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafavaf|goshafavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafavaf|gokishafavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafavafn眉|shafavafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafavafnkn眉|goshafavafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafavafn眉|gokishafavafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafavafsh毛|shafavafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafavafnksh毛|goshafavafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafavafsh毛|gokishafavafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafavafro|shafavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafavafnkro|goshafavafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafavafro|gokishafavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafavafmu|shafavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafavafnkmu|goshafavafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafavafmu|gokishafavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafavafsher|shafavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafavafnksher|goshafavafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafavafsher|gokishafavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafavafng|shafavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafavafnkng|goshafavafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafavafng|gokishafavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafavafya|shafavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafavafnkya|goshafavafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafavafya|gokishafavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafavafyam|shafavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafavafnkyam|goshafavafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafavafyam|gokishafavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafavafn眉sh毛|shafavafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafavafnkn眉sh毛|goshafavafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafavafn眉sh毛|gokishafavafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafavafn眉ro|shafavafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafavafnkn眉ro|goshafavafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafavafn眉ro|gokishafavafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafavafn眉mu|shafavafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafavafnkn眉mu|goshafavafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafavafn眉mu|gokishafavafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafavafsh毛n眉|shafavafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafavafnksh毛n眉|goshafavafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafavafsh毛n眉|gokishafavafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafavafsh毛ro|shafavafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafavafnksh毛ro|goshafavafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafavafsh毛ro|gokishafavafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafavafsh毛mu|shafavafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafavafnksh毛mu|goshafavafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafavafsh毛mu|gokishafavafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafavafron眉|shafavafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafavafnkron眉|goshafavafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafavafron眉|gokishafavafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafavafrosh毛|shafavafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafavafnkrosh毛|goshafavafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafavafrosh毛|gokishafavafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafavafromu|shafavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafavafnkromu|goshafavafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafavafromu|gokishafavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafavafmun眉|shafavafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafavafnkmun眉|goshafavafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafavafmun眉|gokishafavafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafavafmush毛|shafavafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafavafnkmush毛|goshafavafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafavafmush毛|gokishafavafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafavafmuro|shafavafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafavafnkmuro|goshafavafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafavafmuro|gokishafavafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
